items.name: kv-experimental-golang
items.description: kv-experimental-golang

items.name: OkeleDB
items.description: A Nuanced implementation of a Realtime Database, leveraging bbolt a simple lightweight Key value DB storage.

items.name: mcp-trello
items.description: MCP server for the Trello API, written in Go — write/delete gating, local bbolt cache

items.name: bidlobot
items.description: Telegram bot for managing IT-community supergroups (stats, moderation, cleanup, mini-games). Go + telego + bbolt. Dockerized.

items.name: cli-task-manager
items.description: Gophercises exercise. A CLI tool that can be used to manage your TODOs in the terminal.

items.name: moni
items.description: A single-binary Go web dashboard that collects and stores system metrics in bbolt and serves a real-time JSON API and static HTML dashboard (Tailwind, Vanillajs & Chart.js) with zero external dependencies.

items.name: galloc
items.description: 模仿 bbolt 内存分配思路的简单内存分配器 demo

items.name: cs-abuseipdb-bouncer
items.description: CrowdSec bouncer that reports banned IPs to AbuseIPDB — ACID state via bbolt, Prometheus metrics, distroless multi-arch Docker image

items.name: go-hashset
items.description: Hash allowlist/denylist (MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256) for forensics — in-memory or bbolt-backed for NSRL scale. NSRL + text formats.

items.name: tryg-kvstore
items.description: Persistent key-value-timestamp store implemented in Go using bbolt. Provides simple PUT/GET JSON APIs with durable on-disk storage.

items.name: go-locate
items.description: golang locate for search local file or dir very fast

items.name: go-laboratory
items.description: Repository for personal learning and exploration of Go programming language

items.name: raft-kv
items.description: Fault-tolerant distributed key-value store built from scratch in Go, implementing the Raft consensus algorithm with crash-safe persistence and at-most-once write semantics.

items.name: mydb-server
items.description: Redis protocol redcon based db server with Boltdb and Sniper

items.name: kvdb
items.description: kvdb is a flexible database abstraction layer that provides a consistent interface across multiple storage backends (etcd, BBolt, and in-memory). It implements type validation, indexing, and query capabilities while allowing you to switch between storage engines.

items.name: boltql
items.description: BoltDB query language

items.name: kivigo
items.description: KiviGo is a lightweight, modular Go key-value store library with a unified client API, pluggable backends (Badger, Redis, DynamoDB, etc.), and interchangeable encoders. It simplifies backend switching, testing with a mock backend, health checks, and batch operations for production-ready applications.

items.name: go-fim
items.description: A distributed file integrity monitor: Go agents scan filesystems and report changes to a Python control plane with live dashboard

items.name: bolt
items.description: Eltaline Bolt. Supports database compaction and thus can store big values (over 1MB) from bigbolt, limit, offset and range functions from eltaline bolt, included last fixes from bbolt

items.name: conveyor
items.description: A small, race-tested job queue for Go: worker pool, exponential backoff retries, dead-letter queue, REST API, and Prometheus metrics; in-memory or optional bbolt backend.

items.name: dbms-project
items.description: A from-scratch relational DBMS in Go with an interactive SQL CLI, bbolt-backed persistent storage, catalog and index support, and a full SQL execution pipeline for a compact SQL subset.

items.name: img-cloud-update
items.description: 图片云上传是一款前端使用 vue3+element-plus，后端使用 go+gin+bbolt 的图片上传项目。使用该项目可以让你更快的把本地图片传到远程图片云仓库。

items.name: cveapi
items.description: Go service that scans a directory of CVE JSON documents, builds a Bleve search index with a BoltDB (bbolt) backing store, and exposes a small HTTP API for listing and querying CVEs.

items.name: nanovec
items.description: An embedded, serverless vector database for Go. Think SQLite, but for vectors.

items.name: burrow
items.description: Task catalogue, runner and scheduler

items.name: godb
items.description: 自作リレーショナルDB（Go）— build-your-own.org を背骨に CMU 15-445 / Database Internals / bbolt で補強。M0→M9 のロードマップで TODO を埋める学習用スケルトン。

items.name: tenderdb
items.description: Web app for tender analysis written in Go. Works without Docker.

items.name: binzaar
items.description: A single-binary, local "app store" for Go micro-apps — browse a GitHub-hosted catalog, install/verify/update release binaries for your platform, and scaffold new micro-apps. One domain, three faces: bbolt DB, MCP server, and a tview TUI.

items.name: Bolt.new-clone
items.description: we are just doing the web application to beat the premium version of the bbolt.new and understand the concepts to cloneing and forking the repos by the help of the video={https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fh1s6UbzJ7k&t=436s}

items.name: google-project-01
items.description: Angular based project to test some Google Services
